since_last: 44% of 89 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads +1.04%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.35% · BTC +2.44% · Gold +1.61% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 44% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at +1.04%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.04%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +11.19%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +11.19%, PLTR +4.08%, AAPL +3.92%, OKLO +3.91%, OKLO +3.91%. Laggards: KLAC -7.70%, TER -7.07%, LRCX -6.34%, TSLA -6.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.33% at $158.06
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.33% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
